sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100241" key="sunepizhte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπι-ζητέω</orth>, <sense id="n100241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">examine along with</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινί τι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
